message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.loadtxt + numpy.genfromtxt passthrough wrappers (br-franken_numpy-7mzs, br-franken_numpy-9huf)

Expose fnp_python.loadtxt and fnp_python.genfromtxt delegating to
numpy.loadtxt and numpy.genfromtxt. All documented kwargs forward so
the full numpy surface is exposed; genfromtxt covers 23 kwargs.

Joint parity oracle test covers:
- loadtxt whitespace-separated integers
- loadtxt delimiter=',' float64 dtype
- loadtxt skiprows + usecols column selection
- loadtxt unpack=True transposed-tuple return
- genfromtxt names=True header row with dtype.names parity
- genfromtxt missing_values='NA' + filling_values=-1
- genfromtxt skip_header + skip_footer

Both wrappers consume file-like inputs (tested via io.StringIO);
a fresh StringIO is built per call since the parsers consume the stream.
